en_title: Why Valve Refuses to Subsidize Its $1,049 Steam Machine
cn_title: Valve拒绝补贴1049美元(约合人民币7123元)Steam Machine
subtitle: 开放生态才是王道
opus_summary: Valve解释为何不为Steam Machine提供补贴，售价1049美元(约合人民币7123元)，因组件成本上涨33%而提价，并坚持PC开放生态理念。

paragraphs.en: Valve has explained why it refuses to subsidize the Steam Machine , which launched yesterday priced at least $1,049.
paragraphs.cn: Valve解释了为何拒绝为Steam Machine提供补贴，这款设备昨日上市，售价至少1049美元(约合人民币7123元)。

paragraphs.en: IGN has an interview with Valve discussing the price of the hardware and the impact the ongoing ‘RAM apocalypse’ had on the company’s pricing plan. But ahead of this week’s announcement, some had called for Valve, which earns billions of dollars in revenue each year through PC games platform Steam, to subsidize the cost to make it a more accessible device and theoretically at least, have a greater number of people buying games through their ecosystem.
paragraphs.cn: IGN对Valve进行了采访，探讨了这款硬件的定价，以及持续中的「RAM荒」对其定价计划造成的影响。不过在本周公布之前，有人曾呼吁Valve提供补贴以降低售价，使其成为更亲民的设备，这样至少在理论上能让更多人通过其生态购买游戏。Valve每年通过PC游戏平台Steam赚取数十亿美元收入。

paragraphs.en: In November last year, Larian publishing director Michael Douse, who is in charge of business development regarding the likes of Steam megahit Baldur’s Gate 3, took to social media to suggest Valve would lose “far more” than the approximate $200 difference by not having more users on the Steam storefront, “which is essentially a money printing machine.”
paragraphs.cn: 去年11月，Larian发行总监迈克尔Douse在社交媒体上表示，Valve若不让更多用户留在Steam店面，损失的将远超这约200美元(约合人民币1358元)的差价。他形容Steam「本质上是一台印钞机」。Douse负责《博德之门3》等Steam爆款游戏的商务拓展。

paragraphs.en: “That said it isn't stupid to not sell things at a loss, just peculiar in this case,” Douse continued.
paragraphs.cn: 「话虽如此，不亏本卖东西并不愚蠢，只是在这个个例中显得有些奇怪。」Douse接着说。

paragraphs.en: Valve has suggested to IGN that it originally planned to sell Steam Machine for around $749 , but ended up raising the price by about 33% amid the rising cost and scarcity of components. The company hasn’t absorbed that increase, and in a post on its website , it explained why.
paragraphs.cn: Valve向IGN透露，它最初计划以大约749美元(约合人民币5086元)的价格出售Steam Machine，但最终因组件成本上涨和短缺而将价格提高了约33%。公司没有自行吸收这部分成本涨幅，并在其官网的一篇文章中解释了原因。

paragraphs.en: “We think of Steam Machine as an extension of PC gaming, not as a console,” Valve explained. “The traditional console model is to sell hardware at a loss and make up the revenue with subscription services or by selling games that are locked-in to the hardware. We think this can make sense for a single business in the short term but that open ecosystems are better for customers over the long term. PC gaming's history proves this: The openness of the PC gaming space has enabled it to be the primary driver of hardware and software innovation for decades.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们将Steam Machine视为PC游戏的延伸，而不是一台主机。」Valve解释说，「传统主机模式是亏本卖硬件，再通过订阅服务或销售硬件独占的游戏来弥补收入。我们认为，这对单个企业在短期内可能行得通，但对消费者而言，长期来看开放生态更有利。PC游戏的发展史证明了这一点：数十年来，PC游戏领域的开放性使其成为硬件和软件创新的主要驱动力。」

paragraphs.en: “The strength of PC gaming is the ability to play the games you want on the hardware you want. Steam Machine is *a* solution to these problems (and we think it's a great one), but it's not the only solution, and we don't want it to be.”
paragraphs.cn: 「PC游戏的强大之处在于能在你想要的硬件上玩你想玩的游戏。Steam Machine是解决这些问题的一个方案（我们觉得它很棒），但它不是唯一的方案，我们也不想让它成为唯一。」

paragraphs.en: Valve’s statement here is in stark contrast to the policy of the console manufacturers such as Microsoft and Sony, who have traditionally absorbed a loss on the sale of each console knowing profit will be made further down the line with software and services revenue. But gamers are bracing themselves for astronomical next-gen console prices, too.
paragraphs.cn: Valve的这番表态与微软、索尼等主机厂商的做法截然相反，后者历来是亏本卖主机，靠后续的软件和服务收入盈利。但玩家们也正为下一代主机的天价做好心理准备。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, new Xbox boss Asha Sharma said the spiralling cost of new and existing consoles would require "radically different business models" over the coming generation. Speaking to Fortune, Sharma acknowledged the increasing price of existing hardware and components — fuelled by global crises and the rise of AI — and said the industry had "reached a point where it will be hard to imagine" mass audiences still being able to afford "thousands of dollars" for a new console generation.
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，XBOX新任负责人Asha Sharma表示，新老主机成本不断攀升，未来一代主机需要「截然不同的商业模式」。她在接受《财富》采访时承认，受全球危机和AI崛起推动，现有硬件和组件的价格持续上涨，并称业界已「到了一个难以想象的地步」，广大消费者可能无力承受新一代主机「数千美元」的价格。

paragraphs.en: For the first time, the current PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S generation of consoles have seen price increases rather than cost savings over the course of the past five years. Nintendo is not immune to this either, and recently acknowledged it would up the price of Switch 2, just over a year after its arrival.
paragraphs.cn: 这是首次，当前的PS5和XBOX Series一代主机在过去五年里遭遇涨价而非降价。任天堂也未能幸免，并在近日承认，Switch 2上市仅一年多就会提价。

paragraphs.en: Both the Steam Machine 2TB and 2TB bundle options come with two additional faceplates: red fabric, and solid walnut.
paragraphs.cn: 无论选择Steam Machine 2TB版还是2TB套装，都会附赠两款额外的面板：红色织物款和实心胡桃木款。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上关注他@wyp100，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com和wyp100@proton.me（保密）联系他。
